no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction prescribes the exact variable name `is_refreshable_view`, the exact comment text including 'TRUNCATE doesn't stop...orphaned view would keep refreshing indefinitely...', and the exact condition pattern `!is_refreshable_view && settings[Setting::ignore_drop_queries_probability]`, leaving little reasoning to do.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert exact strings like `dynamic_cast<StorageMaterializedView *>`, `isRefreshable()`, variable name `is_refreshable_view`, and exact regex `!is_refreshable_view\s*&&\s*settings[Setting::ignore_drop_queries_probability]`, rejecting equivalent fixes (e.g., using a helper, different cast, different ordering).

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all the requirements explicitly mentioned in instruction.md (comment, variable name, condition usage).
